vocab.meaning: tình trạng giao thông tắc nghẽn hoàn toàn
vocab.example: When I'm stuck in a total gridlock, I try to remain calm instead of getting frustrated.

vocab.meaning: lắng nghe/xem một chương trình nào đó
vocab.example: I usually tune into a daily news podcast to keep my mind occupied while the cars are barely moving.

vocab.meaning: sự nản lòng của người tham gia giao thông
vocab.example: To avoid the common commuter frustration, I treat the extra time as an opportunity for some self-reflection.
I often kill time by catching up on some language learning apps if I'm not the one behind the wheel.

vocab.meaning: nối đuôi nhau sát nút (ùn tắc kéo dài)
vocab.example: In bumper-to-bumper traffic, there's not much you can do except wait patiently for the flow to resume.
It's vital to keep one's cool during peak hours to avoid any unnecessary road rage incidents.
I use the stillness of a traffic jam to contemplate my schedule for the upcoming week.
Whenever we are bogged down in traffic, I find that listening to lo-fi music helps lower my stress levels.

vocab.meaning: đi đường vòng (để tránh chỗ tắc)
vocab.example: If the GPS indicates a long delay, I might try to take a detour through some less-congested side streets.

vocab.meaning: thời gian chết không sinh lời
vocab.example: I despise unproductive downtime, so I always have an audiobook ready for those unexpected delays on the road.
